achievements.description: Defeat King Jellyfish without taking damage, touching the goo, double jumping, bubble bashing, using the cruise bubble or leaving the top of the mountain

achievements.description: Defeat Prawn without taking damage, bubble bashing, and without double jumping more than 5 times
